question: Which vocabulary should I query for tags on LumenLoop directory projects?

golden.answer: Use get_project_tags_vocabulary for the live directory-project tag rows. Keep it separate from article/AV content tags and from the small project-category vocabulary. Use exact returned names/slugs when filtering or labeling and re-query when current values matter.
keyFacts: Uses get_project_tags_vocabulary as the directory-project tag VOCAB source.
Separates project tags from content tags and project categories.
avoid: Do NOT substitute content tags or categories for directory project tags.
Do NOT invent a project-tag value absent from the returned vocabulary.

sources.note: Fetch-verified local path exists and defines the exercised contract/workflow.

evidence: 2026-07-11 localhost:8787 search→execute probe observed: HTTP 200; get_project_tags_vocabulary returned envelope ok=true with project-tag rows.
catalog/manifest.json exists and supports the behavioral golden.
